title: Create: Kryeit
description: Library bringing some Create mod Events
body:
Adds Events for developers to use. All events are **cancellable**.

Current Events:
- ClipboardEditEvent
- ControlsInteractEvent
- GlueCreateEvent
- GlueKillEvent
- PotatoCannonShootEvent
- ScheduleEntityInteractEvent
- ToolboxEquipEvent
- ToolboxPickupEvent
- TrainAssembleEvent
- TrainChangeNameEvent
- TrainDisassembleEvent
- TrainRelocationEvent
- TrainStorageInteractEvent

Add it to your dependencies through [Modrinth's Maven](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8801191-modrinth-maven)

Additionally, if [GriefDefender](https://griefdefender.com) is installed, all events mentioned above are protected in claims. Also adds `/traintrust` and `/trainuntrust`
